description: Lock Social Media to a 1990s web-service/community-publishing scope without smartphone or psychology prerequisites.

checks.reason: The source-backed scope is web-based social network and community-publishing services.
Smartphones are access and scaling channels for later social media use, not prerequisites for the 1990s web-service category.
Psychology is contextual user-behavior knowledge, not a direct technology prerequisite for the scoped web-service platform category.
